headlines: Coinbase wins conditional OCC approval for a national trust charter
Coinbase says CLARITY Act stablecoin deal is 'very close'
Volatility Shares launches new 2x leveraged altcoin ETFs (ADA, XLM, LINK)
Deloitte confirms Ripple’s RLUSD stablecoin is fully backed
BitGo launches institutional stablecoin minting platform (BitGo Mint) for clients

articles.title: Coinbase wins conditional OCC approval for a national trust charter
articles.summary: Coinbase received conditional approval from U.S. banking regulators to form a federally chartered national trust company, a step that could let the exchange offer custody and banking-style services under federal oversight. ([news.bloomberglaw.com](https://news.bloomberglaw.com/crypto/coinbase-says-it-wins-conditional-us-approval-for-trust-charter?utm_source=openai))

articles.title: Coinbase says CLARITY Act stablecoin deal is 'very close'
articles.summary: Coinbase’s chief legal officer said negotiators may reach a compromise on the CLARITY Act’s stablecoin 'yield' language within 48 hours, moving the long-running U.S. stablecoin debate toward a possible Senate markup. ([coinpaper.com](https://coinpaper.com/15950/coinbase-clo-expects-clarity-act-stablecoin-rewards-deal-this-week?utm_source=openai))

articles.title: Volatility Shares launches 2x leveraged ETFs for Cardano, Stellar and Chainlink
articles.summary: Volatility Shares rolled out new 2x leveraged ETFs giving investors doubled exposure to Cardano (ADA), Stellar (XLM) and Chainlink (LINK) — expanding the wave of crypto ETF product variety. Leveraged ETFs carry extra risk and are aimed at short-term or professional traders. ([stockanalysis.com](https://stockanalysis.com/etf/crdx/?utm_source=openai))

articles.title: Big Four auditor Deloitte verifies Ripple’s RLUSD reserves
articles.summary: Deloitte released an attestation confirming Ripple’s RLUSD stablecoin reserves exceed tokens in circulation, a credibility boost for the dollar-backed coin as it pursues more institutional use. ([coinpaper.com](https://coinpaper.com/15957/big-four-auditing-firm-deloitte-validates-ripple-s-rlusd-in-major-credibility-boost?utm_source=openai))

articles.title: BitGo launches stablecoin minting platform for institutional clients
articles.summary: BitGo announced 'BitGo Mint', a stablecoin-as-a-service platform that lets institutional issuers mint and manage regulated dollar-pegged coins through BitGo’s custody and distribution network. The move targets banks, asset managers and exchanges. ([news.bitcoin.com](https://news.bitcoin.com/nyse-listed-bitgo-rolls-out-stablecoin-minting-platform-for-institutional-clients//?utm_source=openai))

articles.title: Bitcoin slips to mid-$60k as markets react to macro and geopolitical news
articles.summary: Bitcoin traded lower on April 2, sliding into the mid-$60,000s as investors reacted to fresh macro and geopolitical headlines that weighed on risk assets. Market volatility and liquidations pushed short-term selling across crypto. ([finance.yahoo.com](https://finance.yahoo.com/personal-finance/investing/article/bitcoin-and-ethereum-price-today-thursday-april-2-2026-prices-lose-ground-after-trump-promises-quick-fierce-end-to-war-120045450.html?utm_source=openai))

articles.title: Ethereum Foundation stakes $46.2M in ETH — largest single staking event
articles.summary: On-chain data shows the Ethereum Foundation deposited roughly 22,517 ETH (~$46.2M) into staking, its biggest single staking operation to date as the foundation moves more treasury assets into yield-generating activity. ([dailycoin.com](https://dailycoin.com/ethereum-foundation-stakes-22517-eth-record-transaction/?utm_source=openai))

articles.title: Coinbase, Cloudflare and Stripe build infrastructure for 'AI money'
articles.summary: Big tech and payments firms including Coinbase, Cloudflare and Stripe are working on systems that would let AI agents handle payments and money — a trend that could reshape how crypto and web payments interact with AI services. ([news.bloomberglaw.com](https://news.bloomberglaw.com/business-and-practice/coinbase-cloudflare-stripe-push-to-shape-future-of-ai-money?utm_source=openai))
